title: lobelia cordigera var. multiflora
intro: Lobelia cordigera var. multiflora, also known as Lobelia, is a flowering plant species native to the Himalayan region and parts of Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic compounds that can help to ease muscle and nerve pain. The health benefits of Lobelia include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Lobelia is often used in herbal preparations such as tinctures, teas, and salves, and is typically taken in small doses due to its potent effects.
